title: Vec param where slice would suffice in routing APIs
description:
Several functions take owned Vec where &[T] would work:

- lichen-rpl/src/routing.rs:120 `pub fn fresh(path: Vec<[u8; 16]>)`
- lichen-rpl/src/routing.rs:147 `pub fn refresh(&mut self, path: Vec<[u8; 16]>)`
- lichen-rpl/src/routing.rs:179 `pub fn add_route(&mut self, target: [u8; 16], path: Vec<[u8; 16]>)`

These force callers to allocate even when the path data is already available. Consider accepting `&[[u8; 16]]` and cloning internally if storage is needed.
